title: Jaspin's Items
description: Jaspin's Items adds various items and tools to Minecraft. This mod aims for quality over quantity.
body:
Jaspin's Items adds a variety of items with different uses.

- Boom Stick - A ranged, throwable TNT.
  ![A throwable TNT.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bea08bfe41cd9badf4e481d47c1c6edcded6b4ae.png)
- The Ender Dwarf - A passive enderman-like creature.
  ![The Ender Dwarf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3588464b9b4181ce7432e8358b4d8b25eb6711ab.png)
- The Whisp - A mysterious creature from the sky.
  ![The Whisp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a0f7604799861b9841ade07e11f22d5140e867f.png)
- Giant Hammer - A huge, destructive force.
  ![The Giant Hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0817f50ae5650b18a3f1a27f3d2bef5e1c7f1a19.png)
- Air Gun - Launch yourself up high!
  ![The Air Gun](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ece8ef6c8c2a4c89f5c068543bbdade994b79e3.png)
- Workbench - Not Functional Yet
  ![The Workbench](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0beaa65074815e57970f28de21436dd861ec47fc.png)
